INTJ.label: Architect
INTJ.desc: Strategic, logical, and driven by your own original ideas. You are an innovative, independent thinker who enjoys speculation and creative problem-solving to achieve long-term improvements.

INTP.label: Logician
INTP.desc: Intellectual, logical, and reserved with a flexible, imaginative mind. You are an original thinker who loves exploring theories and abstract concepts to find creative solutions.

ENTJ.label: Commander
ENTJ.desc: Strategic, logical, and ambitious with a gift for organizing people. You are an effective organizer who drives long-range planning and gets things done with decisive confidence.

ENTP.label: Debater
ENTP.desc: Inventive, enthusiastic, and entrepreneurial with a strategic mind. You enjoy new ideas, challenges, and value inspiration, often seeing possibilities others miss.

INFJ.label: Advocate
INFJ.desc: Idealistic, organized, and insightful with deep compassion. You seek harmony and cooperation, valuing personal growth and meaningful connections with others.

INFP.label: Mediator
INFP.desc: Sensitive, creative, and perceptive with an idealistic heart. You value inner harmony and personal growth, focusing on dreams and possibilities that feel authentic.

ENFJ.label: Protagonist
ENFJ.desc: Caring, enthusiastic, and diplomatically organized. You are a skilled communicator who values connection with people and inspires others through genuine warmth.

ENFP.label: Campaigner
ENFP.desc: Enthusiastic, creative, and spontaneously optimistic. You value inspiration and enjoy starting new projects while seeing the potential in others around you.

ISTJ.label: Logistician
ISTJ.desc: Responsible, sincere, and realistically systematic. You are hardworking and trustworthy, valuing practical judgment and a methodical approach to getting things done.

ISFJ.label: Defender
ISFJ.desc: Warm, considerate, and responsibly thorough. You are a devoted caretaker who enjoys being helpful to others, approaching life with pragmatic gentleness.

ESTJ.label: Executive
ESTJ.desc: Efficient, outgoing, and systematically dependable. You like to run the show and get things done in an orderly fashion, bringing analytical leadership to every situation.

ESFJ.label: Consul
ESFJ.desc: Friendly, outgoing, and conscientiously organized. You seek to be helpful and please others, enjoying being active and productive in building community.

ISTP.label: Virtuoso
ISTP.desc: Action-oriented, logical, and spontaneously reserved. You enjoy adventure and are skilled at understanding how mechanical things work with cool, analytical precision.

ISFP.label: Adventurer
ISFP.desc: Gentle, sensitive, and flexibly realistic. You seek to create a personal environment that is both beautiful and practical, approaching life with quiet curiosity.

ESTP.label: Entrepreneur
ESTP.desc: Outgoing, realistic, and versatile with a spontaneous edge. You are a pragmatic problem solver and skillful negotiator who thrives on action and new challenges.

ESFP.label: Entertainer
ESFP.desc: Playful, enthusiastic, and tactfully flexible. You have strong common sense and enjoy helping people in tangible ways with your spontaneous, friendly energy.

D.label: Dominance
D.desc: You are confident, direct, and results-driven. You make quick decisions, take action without hesitation, and care deeply about getting things done efficiently. In conversation you push straight to outcomes — you challenge ideas without apology, ask pointed what-and-how questions, and won't dress up a disagreeable truth to spare feelings.

I.label: Influence
I.desc: You are energetic, enthusiastic, and inspiring. You excel at connecting with people, highlighting positive things, and convincing others through your natural persuasiveness. In conversation you trade precision for energy — you win people over with enthusiasm and stories, ask who-and-why questions that keep the focus on connection, and would rather win the room than win the argument.

S.label: Steadiness
S.desc: You are patient, dependable, and thoughtful. You stay calm under pressure, value honesty and consistency, and stick to your commitments while treating others with fairness. In conversation you lead with warmth and patience — you ask how decisions affect people, prefer dialogue that builds consensus over confrontation, and communicate with care that makes others feel genuinely heard.

C.label: Conscientiousness
C.desc: You value accuracy and doing things the right way. You are detail-oriented, care about high-quality work, and focus on precision with analytical thoroughness. In conversation you slow down for precision — you ask what-the-data-says and why questions before accepting a conclusion, prefer written communication that lets you think before you respond, and would rather catch an error now than ship a mistake later.
